default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, you **may** be unable to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Hotfix:
- Logic error caused the game to force offline login


## Updates:
- Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Added Thai language option to the language list by [youfeng11](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Added support for rendering with SurfaceView

## Changes:
- Accounts: Refresh Microsoft account only when the token expires

## Fixes:
- Input method:
  - Crashes related to focus issues
  - Enter key not responding properly in the input method

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，**可能**无法启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 热修复：
- 逻辑错误导致游戏内强制使用离线登录


## 更新：
- 同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- 语言列表增加泰语选项 by [由风](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- 支持使用 SurfaceView 渲染


## 调整：
- 账号：仅在令牌过期时，刷新微软账号


## 修复：
- 输入法：
  - 焦点相关问题引起的崩溃
  - 输入法回车无法正常响应
